/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--disable-new-dtags CMakeFiles/gsdk_basic_example.dir/examples/sdk_basic_example.cpp.o -o bin/gsdk_basic_example   -L/home/liu/gsdk/GSDK/lib/x86  -L/home/liu/gsdk/GSDK/lib/x86/3rd  -L/home/liu/gsdk/GSDK/lib/x86/boringssl  -L/home/liu/gsdk/GSDK/lib/x86/boost  -L/home/liu/gsdk/GSDK/lib/x86/ctb  -L/home/liu/gsdk/GSDK/lib/x86/event  -L/home/liu/gsdk/GSDK/lib/x86/event/lib  -L/home/liu/gsdk/GSDK/lib/x86/pcre2  -L/home/liu/gsdk/GSDK/lib/x86/quic  -L/home/liu/gsdk/GSDK/lib/x86/ffmpeg  -L/home/liu/gsdk/GSDK/lib/x86/OSG365  -L/home/liu/gsdk/GSDK/lib/x86/gdal  -L/home/liu/gsdk/GSDK/lib/x86/datachannel  -L/home/liu/gsdk/GSDK/lib/x86/datachannel/lib  -L/home/liu/gsdk/GSDK/lib/x86/mosquitto  -Wl,-rpath,/home/liu/gsdk/GSDK/lib/x86:/home/liu/gsdk/GSDK/lib/x86/3rd:/home/liu/gsdk/GSDK/lib/x86/boringssl:/home/liu/gsdk/GSDK/lib/x86/boost:/home/liu/gsdk/GSDK/lib/x86/ctb:/home/liu/gsdk/GSDK/lib/x86/event:/home/liu/gsdk/GSDK/lib/x86/event/lib:/home/liu/gsdk/GSDK/lib/x86/pcre2:/home/liu/gsdk/GSDK/lib/x86/quic:/home/liu/gsdk/GSDK/lib/x86/ffmpeg:/home/liu/gsdk/GSDK/lib/x86/OSG365:/home/liu/gsdk/GSDK/lib/x86/gdal:/home/liu/gsdk/GSDK/lib/x86/datachannel:/home/liu/gsdk/GSDK/lib/x86/datachannel/lib:/home/liu/gsdk/GSDK/lib/x86/mosquitto
